appDescription.message: Support content you love. Pay as you browse!

missingHostPermission_text.message: Permission to access your data on all websites is required to use Web Monetization.

notMonetized_allInvalid_text.message: This page cannot receive payments from your wallet at this time. Please check back later.
notMonetized_allInvalid_text.description: We cannot send money (probable cause: un-peered wallets)

notMonetized_newTab_text.message: The extension does not support empty tabs.

notMonetized_internalPage_text.message: The extension cannot access the browser's internal pages.

notMonetized_unsupportedScheme_text.message: Web Monetization only works with websites using https://.

app_disabled_text.message: The extension is disabled. Click the power icon above to enable the extension and continue making payments.

keyRevoked_text.message: It appears the key has been revoked from your wallet. Please authenticate by adding the key again, or disconnect.

keyRevoked_disconnect_action.message: Yes, let me disconnect my wallet

keyRevoked_reconnect_action.message: It was a mistake, I’d like to reconnect my wallet

keyRevoked_copyKey_text.message: *Before* you reconnect, copy the public key below and add it to your wallet.

disconnectWallet_error.message: We were unable to disconnect your wallet ($ERROR$).

pay_notEnoughFunds_error.message: Insufficient funds to complete the payment.

pay_outgoingPaymentFailed_error.message: We were unable to process this transaction. Please try again!

pay_outgoingPaymentPollingIncomplete_war.message: It looks like this is taking long. Check your wallet later to ensure the payment went through.
pay_outgoingPaymentPollingIncomplete_war.description: We were polling for completion, but it's not finished yet - could mean it'll never succeed or it'll take a long time to settle.

pay_error.message: We were unable to process this transaction. Please try again!

pay_invalidReceivers_error.message: This page cannot receive payments from your wallet at this time. Please check back later.
pay_invalidReceivers_error.description: We cannot send money (probable cause: un-peered wallets)

outOfFunds_error_text.message: Funds are depleted. You can no longer make payments.

outOfFunds_recurringAutoRenew_text.message: If you do nothing, $AMOUNT$ will automatically be renewed and available on $AUTO_RENEW_DATE$

outOfFunds_optionOneTime_action.message: Let me top-up funds one time

outOfFunds_optionRecurring_action.message: Let me add funds & auto-renew monthly

outOfFundsAddFunds_amount_oneTime_desc.message: Enter the amount to add from the wallet.

outOfFundsAddFunds_amount_recurring_desc.message: Enter the amount to add from your wallet. This amount will renew automatically each month (next: $NEXT_RENEW_DATE$).

connectWallet_desc.message: Just a few quick steps to connect the extension to your wallet

connectWallet_amount_group_label.message: Enter the amount to allocate from your wallet

connectWallet_publicKey_label.message: Please copy this key, paste it manually into your wallet, and then connect. [Learn more](https://webmonetization.org/supporters/get-started/#resolve-a-key-addition-failure).

connectWallet_url_invalidNotHttps_error.message: The wallet address must be a valid https:// URL or a payment pointer.

connectWallet_amount_invalidNumber_error.message: Please enter a valid number for the amount.

connectWallet_amount_minimum_error.message: A minimum amount of $AMOUNT$ is required.

connectWallet_failedAutoKeyAdd_error.message: Unable to automatically connect to your wallet.

connectWallet_failedAutoKeyAdd_why_text.description: Click here to see the reason why automatic key addition failed.

connectWallet_invalidClient_error.message: Connection failed. Please ensure the key is added to the correct wallet.

connectWallet_tabClosed_error.message: Wallet connection cancelled. The tab was closed before completion.

connectWallet_grantRejected_error.message: Wallet connection cancelled. The request was not authorized.

connectWallet_timeout_error.message: Connecting to wallet took too long. Please try again.

connectWalletKeyService_consent_text__1.message: We will automatically connect with your wallet provider. [Learn more](https://webmonetization.org/supporters/get-started/#resolve-a-key-addition-failure)

reconnectWalletKeyService_consent_text__.message: We will automatically reconnect with your wallet provider. [Learn more](https://webmonetization.org/supporters/get-started/#resolve-a-key-addition-failure)

connectWalletKeyService_consent_text__2.message: By agreeing, you provide us consent to automatically access your wallet to securely add a key.

connectWalletKeyService_consent_text__3.message: Please note, this process does not involve accessing or handling your funds.

connectWalletKeyService_notImplemented_e.message: Automatic key addition is not yet implemented for the selected wallet provider.

connectWalletKeyService_noConsent_error.message: You declined consent for automatic key addition.

connectWalletKeyService_failed_error.message: Automatic key addition failed at step “$STEP_ID$” with message “$MESSAGE$”.

connectWalletKeyService_timeoutLogin_err.message: The login attempt has timed out.

connectWalletKeyService_accountNotFound_.message: Failed to find an account for the provided wallet address. Are you logged into a different account?

postInstall_title.message: Let's get you started with Web Monetization!

postInstall_stepGetWallet_title.message: Get a wallet compatible with Web Monetization

postInstall_stepGetWallet_desc.message: If you don’t already have a Web Monetization-compatible wallet, please set one up, then return here to complete the setup.

postInstall_stepGetWallet_comingSoon_tex.message: More wallets will be added soon…

postInstall_stepWalletAddress_title.message: Find your wallet address or payment pointer

postInstall_stepPin_title.message: Pin extension to the browser toolbar

postInstall_stepPin_desc.message: Pin the Web Monetization Extension for easier access.

postInstall_stepPermissions_title.message: Permission to read all websites required

postInstall_walletConnected_text__2.message: Access the extension from the browser toolbar.

postInstallConsent_title.message: Welcome to the Web Monetization extension

postInstallConsent_header_text__1.message: We’re transparent about what data is shared and how it’s used.

postInstallConsent_header_text__2.message: By continuing, you consent to share the information below.

postInstallConsent_dataShared_yourWallet.message: Note: You will always be asked for consent before any connection.

postInstallConsent_dataShared_websites_d.message: Nothing. The extension never shares your wallet address, balance, or currency with the websites you visit. Your browsing history remains private in your browser.

postInstallConsent_dataShared_browser_de.message: Your IP address, language, and browser version are shared with your wallet provider and the website’s wallet provider while you use the extension.

postInstallConsent_dataShared_headers_te.message: Browsers send certain HTTP headers by default with each request that inform the servers about your language (`Accept-Language` header), browser version (`User-Agent` header) and more. Your IP address is also sent by default.

postInstallConsent_dataCollection_desc.message: The extension gathers anonymous data about how you use it (e.g., clicks, interactions) to help us improve the app and your overall experience.

postInstallConsent_dataCollection_yes_te.message: Uses [PostHog](https://posthog.com/) to collect usage and analytics data.
Assigns each installation a unique ID, and associates your actions and interactions (events) with that ID.

postInstallConsent_dataCollection_no_tex.message: Collect any personally identifiable information, such as your name or wallet address.
Store your IP address. It is only used to estimate your general location, and then it’s immediately discarded.

postInstallConsent_dataCollection_footer.message: This setting takes effect after you click Confirm and Continue. You can change your preferences any time by opening the extension through the browser toolbar → Settings → Data Collection.

postInstallConsent_permissions_text.message: The extension needs basic permissions to work. [See details](https://github.com/interledger/web-monetization-extension/blob/main/docs/PERMISSIONS.md).

postInstallConsent_consentProvided_text.message: You have provided your consent to the above. Access the extension from the browser toolbar.

postInstallConsent_confirmation.message: I confirm that I understand and consent to this data usage.

postConnect_unmapped_text.message: No mapping from status to messages!!

postConnect_changeDetails_action.message: Change the wallet address or budget amount

postConnect_connect_success_text.message: You’re all set to start using the extension.

postConnect_addFunds_success_text.message: Funds were successfully added to your budget.

postConnect_updateBudget_success_text.message: Your new spending limits are now active.

postConnect_connect_cancel_grantRejected.message: Wallet connection was cancelled. Please try again and follow the prompts to complete connection.

postConnect_addFunds_cancel_grantRejecte.message: No funds were added to your budget.

postConnect_updateBudget_cancel_grantRej.message: Your budget settings were not changed.

postConnect_connect_failure_timeout_text.message: The connection to your wallet provider timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

postConnect_addFunds_failure_timeout_tex.message: Adding funds to your budget timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

postConnect_updateBudget_failure_timeout.message: Updating your budget timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

postConnect_connect_failure_keyAdd_text.message: We couldn’t add the public key to your wallet.$DETAILS$

postConnect_reconnect_failure_keyAdd_tex.message: We couldn’t add the public key to your wallet.$DETAILS$

postConnect_connect_failure_other_text.message: Something went wrong while connecting. Please try again.

postConnect_addFunds_failure_other_text.message: Something went wrong while adding funds. Please try again.$DETAILS$

postConnect_updateBudget_failure_other_t.message: Something went wrong while updating your budget. Please try again.$DETAILS$

postConnect_reconnect_failure_other_text.message: We couldn’t verify your wallet. Please try again, or manually copy the public key and add it to your digital wallet account.

settings_rate_continuousPayments_disable.message: Ongoing payments are now disabled. You can still make one time payments.

settings_sitePaymentRates_desc.message: Set a custom hourly rate for any site, we'll apply it automatically when you visit. You can go back to the default rate any time.

settings_sitePaymentRates_maxExceptions_.message: You have reached your custom rates limit. Delete one of your existing custom rates to add a new one.

settings_sitePaymentRates_noExceptions_t.message: There are no custom rates added

settings_dataCollection_desc.message: The extension gathers anonymous data about how you use it (e.g., clicks, interactions) to help us improve the app and your overall experience. Read the full details in our [data policy](/post-install/consent).

consentRequired_updated_title.message: Consent Required: Collection and usage of your data has been updated

consentRequired_subtitle.message: We want to be transparent about what data is shared and how it’s used.

consentRequired_text.message: To use the the Web Monetization Extension, we require your consent to our data collection & transmission policy.
